description_long: This object is a short sword with a straight, double-edged blade made of dark metal, featuring a subtle fuller running along its length. The hilt is composed of a cylindrical handle wrapped in a reddish-brown material, capped with a hexagonal pommel and a matching guard, both adorned with metallic gold accents. The sword is accompanied by two ornate sheaths, each decorated with gold embellishments and sculpted motifs, suggesting a ceremonial or high-status function. The sheaths are constructed from a dark, leather-like material with metallic fittings at the tip and throat, providing both protection and visual appeal. The overall craftsmanship is detailed, with visible texturing on the handle and intricate designs on the metallic parts. This sword and its sheaths would be visually striking if displayed or carried in an urban environment, such as a parade, museum, or historical reenactment.
description: A short, double-edged sword with a dark metal blade, ornate gold-accented hilt, and two richly decorated sheaths made of dark leather and metal.
description_view_0: The sword and both sheaths are shown from the side, highlighting the blade's length, the gold-accented hilt, and the detailed ornamentation on the sheaths.
description_view_1: A narrow edge-on view, showing the thin profile of the sword and sheaths, with minimal visible detail except the thickness and alignment.
description_view_2: A mirrored side view similar to view 0, displaying the opposite side of the sword and sheaths, with the same decorative features visible.
description_view_3: Another edge-on view from the opposite side, again emphasizing the slimness and alignment of the sword and sheaths.
attribute_blade_type: straight, double-edged, short sword blade with fuller
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, wrapped in reddish-brown material, hexagonal pommel, gold accents, slight texturing
attribute_ornamentation: gold embellishments and sculpted motifs on hilt and sheaths
